## Agent Type Legend

| Type | Description | Invocation Pattern |
|------|-------------|-------------------|
| **Infrastructure** | Runs once (project setup) | Explicit first-time command |
| **Process** | Governance gate at workflow milestones | Shortcut trigger (`XXX__`) |
| **Audit** | Deep compliance inspection | Shortcut trigger or scheduled |

## Tier Availability

| Tier | Agents Available | Activation Criteria |
|:----:|-----------------|---------------------|
| 1 | GCE-AG-01, GCE-AG-02, GCE-AG-03 | From first generation |
| 2 | + GCE-AG-04, GCE-AG-05, GCE-AG-06, GCE-AG-08, GCE-AG-09 | Sprint completed, CI exists, ≥2 contributors, score ≥70% |
| 3 | + GCE-AG-07 | Release candidate, deployment target, score ≥85%, no Critical remediations |

Current workspace tier: Read `.compliance-state.json` → `"complianceTier"` field.

## Shortcut Registry

| Shortcut | Maps To | Category |
|----------|---------|----------|
| `CAA__` | compliance-audit-agent | Audit (on demand / scheduled) |
| `PRC__` | pre-pr-checklist-agent | Process (before PR creation) |
| `SDC__` | session-discipline-agent | Process (every session) |
| `SGV__` | sprint-governance-agent | Process (sprint boundary) |
| `CRV__` | code-review-agent | Audit (before PR approve) |
| `SQC__` | steering-quality-agent | Audit (after steering edit) |
| `CMG__` | change-management-agent | Process (before release) |
| `DOD__` | dod-gate-agent | Process (before "done") |
